creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
- Mark games/xracer DEPRECATED.  It has not been developed since 2000 and the FreeBSD
mirrors have been hosting the distfiles for some time now.  There is a later version
available on the developer's website (still from 2000), but it is practically useless.
It builds, but it would be a drastic step down from the version currently in ports.
- Set EXPIRATION_DATE six months from now.

How-To-Repeat: Use attached diff.
